headline: ProMedica / Medical Mutual network dispute — watching brief
date_label: Watching brief · no resolution this window
paragraphs: WTOL reports Medical Mutual may drop ProMedica as an in-network provider in the Toledo area.
why_it_matters: Not core to economic development, but ProMedica is a major downtown employer; insurance-network turbulence affects workforce attraction.
search_terms: ProMedica Medical Mutual Toledo network in-network coverage dispute
